title: Senior AI/ML Engineer - R01558791
description:
Senior Data Engineer

Primary Skills

- Hypothesis Testing, T-Test, Z-Test, Regression (Linear,
  Logistic), Python/PySpark, SAS/SPSS, Statistical analysis
  and computing, Probabilistic Graph Models, Great
  Expectation, Evidently AI, Forecasting (Exponential
  Smoothing, ARIMA, ARIMAX), Tools(KubeFlow, BentoML),
  Classification (Decision Trees, SVM), ML Frameworks
  (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Sci-Kit Learn, CNTK, Keras, MXNet),
  Distance (Hamming Distance, Euclidean Distance, Manhattan
  Distance), R/ R Studio

Specialization

- Data Science Advanced: Data Specialist

Job requirements

- Agentic AI
responsibilities: Perform statistical analysis including hypothesis testing, T-tests, Z-tests, and regression analysis
Implement classification algorithms using decision trees, SVM, and other ML techniques
Develop forecasting models using exponential smoothing, ARIMA, and ARIMAX methods
Utilize ML frameworks including TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn for model development
Work with probabilistic graph models and distance-based algorithms
Use data quality and monitoring tools like Great Expectations and Evidently AI
use_cases: Statistical analysis and hypothesis testing for business insights
Classification and regression modeling for predictive analytics
Time series forecasting for business planning
ai_classification_reasoning:
The job title is Senior AI/ML Engineer but the description
and skills focus heavily on traditional statistical
analysis, ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn),
and data engineering tasks. "Agentic AI" is mentioned under
requirements but no specifics are provided about building
agents, LLM systems, or related AI work, making it
impossible to definitively classify the role.
